Title: Wingwomen
Writer: Mélanie Laurent, Christophe Deslandes, Cédric Anger
Actors: Adèle Exarchopoulos, Mélanie Laurent, Manon Bresch
Plot: Tired of the risks involved in a life of crime, two expert thieves and best friends recruit feisty Sam to assist them with one last job before they move to a new, and less stressful, line of work.
